hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_title: Questions That Open Doors -- Yes/No & Wh-
lesson.menu_desc: Asking questions in professional talks -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Yes/No and Wh- Questions in Professional Conversations
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 6 -- Questions That Open Doors

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel. I sent you an email, but it is not complete. Please call the supplier and ask some questions. Find out what they ship and when it arrives. Ask who handles the contract on their side. Also ask if there is any issue with the schedule. We need a clear status before the meeting. Thank you, and let me know.

Hi, this is Fernanda. I have a few questions about the new order. What do you ship this month? When does the delivery arrive? Who handles the documents on your side? Is there any issue with the payment? Are you available for a quick call on Monday? Please send me a short report with the status. Thank you very much.

extra_audio.text: Daniel calls Fernanda about an order with missing information. He asks her to call the supplier. She asks what they ship and when it arrives. She asks who handles the contract. She asks if there is any issue with the schedule.
